name: Praxis Arndt und Langer
message: Our goal is to maintain your health or to achieve the best possible for your recovery. In this service we provide the diverse diagnostic and therapeutic possibilities of our practice and the competence of our employees.In trusting cooperation with you as a partner, we will find individual solutions. Our range of services covers the entire field of internal medicine, with the focus on general medical care.As a diabetes practice, we are a competent partner in Darmstadt,both in the solution of acute problems and in theLong-term care of your blood sugar disease. https://www.praxis-arndt-langer.de/
